leadText: This article is about the item. For the location featured in the eleventh movie, see Gracidea (Sinnoh). The Gracidea (Japanese: グラシデアのはな Gracidea Flower) is a Key Item introduced in Pokémon Platinum. It is a type of flower that resembles the flowers on Shaymin's head. It allows Land Forme Shaymin to change into Sky Forme. In some places, people give bouquets of these flowers that resemble Shaymin to thank someone to express their gratitude, relating to Shaymin being the Gratitude Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Land Forme Shaymin , the Gracidea changes it into Sky Forme. It cannot be used at night or on a frozen Shaymin. Shaymin changes back to Land Forme during the night , if it is frozen, when deposited into the PC (prior to Generation VII), when withdrawn from the PC (Generation VII), when deposited into Pokémon Bank , or when deposited in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery .

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Upon being used in a dungeon, the Gracidea is consumed and changes Shaymin to its Sky Forme , increasing Movement Speed by 1. Upon leaving the dungeon or reaching a rest stop, Shaymin reverts to its Land Forme .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM A flower sometimes bundled in bouquets to convey gratitude on special occasions like birthdays. P E Sw Sh BD SP A flower sometimes bundled in bouquets to convey gratitude on special occasions, such as birthdays. LA A flower sometimes bundled in bouquets to convey gratitude on special occasions, such as birthdays or anniversaries. S V A flower sometimes bundled into a bouquet to be given as an expression of gratitude on special occasions, such as birthdays and anniversaries.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD S A beautiful flower that blooms on Sky Peak and in the Shaymin Village. Using it on Shaymin causes a Forme change from Land Forme to Sky Forme.
